headline: Should You Chase Gold At Current Prices?
Trump calls out Wells Fargo, banks over LA fire response
summary: The federal government “will be looking into” banks’ actions following last year’s fires, the president said in a social media post Thursday. "The Banks must treat those people … very fairly and well."

headline: Trump Vows Action On Wells Fargo, Other Banks Over Response To Homeowners Affected By LA Wildfire: 'Very Difficult To Deal…'
summary: Trump praises insurers for disaster response but criticizes banks, vows probe and urges fair treatment for victims.

headline: Insurers' FHLB Advances Hit New High As Spread Investing Flourishes
summary: US insurance companies in 2025 broadened and deepened their participation in the federal home loan bank system. Read more here.
